visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Intro scene displays a large Costco Wholesale logo overlay. A cartoon avatar of a man with brown hair and a surprised expression is positioned on the left. The background is a bright, high-ceilinged warehouse with yellow support beams and stacks of merchandise. (2) The scene cuts rapidly to a stack of purple Kirkland tissue paper boxes. Bright white text overlays with black borders appear in the center. (3) Sequence of household items follows: Ariel detergent bags in blue and white packaging, then shelves of pink Philips epilator boxes, and a white freezer containing plastic-wrapped frozen tilapia fillets. (4) Transition to snack aisles: I-Mei Gummy chocolate boxes, Maltesers red packaging, and Dyson vacuum cleaners on stands. (5) Food and drink products are shown in rapid succession: bottles of Super X protein drinks, blue packs of Eclipse mints, and red bags of Bee Cheng Hiang pork snacks. The camera pans slightly across product stacks for each shot. (6) Beverage section: Rows of red wine bottles, green tea bottles, and stacks of beer cases. Lighting remains consistently bright and artificial. (7) Final sequence shows various health supplements and food packs: Bibigo sauces, frozen beef, oat milk cartons, and boxes of Brand's Chicken Essence. Each cut lasts approximately 1-2 seconds.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 比爾特派. [Slogan]: 好市多 每週特價速報 05/05~05/11 記得追蹤我們. (2) [Slogan]: 科克蘭 三層抽取式衛生紙 原價369 -24 特價345. (3) [Slogan]: ARIEL 補充包 抗菌抗臭洗衣精 原價859 -180 特價679. (4) [Slogan]: 飛利浦 乾濕兩用美體刀 原價2999 -800 特價2199. (5) [Slogan]: 冷凍鯛魚片 原價539/KG -50 特價489/KG. (6) [Slogan]: 義美 QQ糖巧克力球 原價399 -80 特價319. (7) [Slogan]: MALTESERS 麥提莎 麥芽脆心巧克力 原價439 -90 特價349. (8) [Slogan]: DYSON V11 SV15 手提無線吸塵器 原價12999 -1600 特價11399. (9) [Slogan]: SUPER X 頂級分離乳清蛋白飲 PLUS 奶茶風味 原價899 -180 特價719. (10) [Slogan]: ECLIPSE 易口舒 無糖勁爽薄荷錠 原價419 -100 特價319.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: The camera captures shoppers in the background aisles and backs of heads throughout the video.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Costco warehouse interior featuring high ceilings, industrial shelving, refrigeration units, and bulk product displays.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A lively, synthesized BGM track with a bouncy rhythm begins. A male narrator with a bright and energetic tone introduces the 'Costco weekly special report' in Mandarin Chinese. (2) The narrator speaks at a rapid, consistent pace, listing each product and its discounted price. Every few seconds, a subtle digital 'whoosh' sound marks the transition between product mentions. (3) The vocal delivery maintains high arousal and a professional yet friendly broadcast quality. The background music remains steady throughout, providing a high-energy pulse beneath the narration. (4) The audio track is extremely clean, focusing entirely on the voiceover and the upbeat background music, with virtually no audible environmental warehouse noise.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: Inform viewers about the current week's discount items at Costco to encourage immediate shopping and channel engagement.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The entire video is dedicated to showcasing Costco's promotional prices and products.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes a high-information density format typical of social media commerce promotion, characterized by fast cuts and clear price call-outs.
